articles.title: Forex Today: US Dollar holds firm, Oil surges as Iran deadline keeps markets on edge
articles.expand: The US Dollar Index (DXY) held near 99.80, not far from last week’s 100 peak, broadly supported as markets remain locked on the Iran conflict and, in particular, on United States (US) President Donald Trump’s deadline for 8:00pm EST tied to the Strait of Hormuz.
